name: Followups: Handle Reply

description.en: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message. Tags the contact as 'followups-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled appropriately.
description.de: Erfassen, dass ein Kontakt auf eine Follow-up-Nachricht geantwortet hat. Markiert den Kontakt als 'followups-replied', damit die Sequenz gestoppt und die Antwort angemessen behandelt werden kann.
description.es: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message. Tags the contact as 'followups-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled appropriately.
description.fr: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message. Tags the contact as 'followups-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled appropriately.
description.ro: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message. Tags the contact as 'followups-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled appropriately.
description.it: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message. Tags the contact as 'followups-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled appropriately.

bot: Use this when a contact replies to a follow-up message. Tags them as replied and logs the interaction as an activity via the generic contact-activity-log warp.

inputs.name: Contact
inputs.bot: The hashid of the CRM contact who replied.

inputs.name: Description

description.en: Summary of what the contact said
description.fr: Résumé de la réponse du contact
description.es: Resumen de lo que dijo el contacto
description.it: Riepilogo di ciò che ha detto il contatto

inputs.bot: Brief summary of what the contact said in their reply. This gets logged as an activity on the contact.

success.en: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.de: Antwort erfasst. Kontakt als geantwortet markiert.
success.es: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.fr: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.ro: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.it: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
